titleStmt.title: SII 41.199: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 199. (A.R. No. 417 of 1905.) Guḍimallūr, Walaja Taluk, North Arcot District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Bhūmīśvara temple at Guḍimallūr.

p.hi: Vijayanagara, Sadāsivadēva-Mahārāya, Śaka 1472, Sādhāraṇa, Karkaṭaka, Purva 5, Monday, Hasta (irregular) = 1550 A.D.

summary.p: Mentions Kalavaippaṟṟu in Perundimiri-nāḍu, a sub-division of Paḍuvūr-kōṭṭam. Records that ūravar of four villages, Mukam Vaṉṉivēḍu, Valli-ūr, Tiruvēkampachēri and Tiruvēlai-chēri included in Kāveripākkam-sīrmai gave consent to the ūravar of Chekanāta-nallūr alias Pūṇḍi in Karaivaḻi-nāḍu for digging river channel passing through their villages. This is said to be made for the merit of Krishnappa Nāyakka son of Vayyappa-Nāyakkar and Pappu-Nāykkar, son of Vīrappa-Nāyakkar Nayiṉappa-Nāyakkar of Vēlūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§śubhamastu svastiśrī . śrīman mahāmaṇṭalecuvara metiṉimīcura kaṇṭakaṭṭāri cāḷuva catāciva tevamakā Irāyar piṟutivirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāṟttam 1000 4 100 7 10 2ṉ mel cellā niṉṟa cātāraṇa varuṣam kaṭaka nāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu pañcamiyum comavāramum peṟṟaasta nakṣattirattu nāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattup paṭuvūṟ
koṭṭattu peruntimiri nāṭṭu kalavaiypaṟṟu karaivaḻi pālāṟu vaṭapurivāṉa kāveripākkattu cirmaiyil mukamvaṉṉiveṭu pallavarā(rrā)irum ciapparum paḻantiparāku(p)parum taṇṭalam kiḻār vīraperumāḷum vāṇātarāyar Ellapparum vaṇṇakkicuratevarum tevantaiyār peṟṟaperumāḷum toṇṭaimāṉ maṟṟumuḷḷa Ūravarum valliūr
nayiṉār maṇṇaiappanayiṉār koyil tāṉattār ñānamuttiyaār puvanaṅkāttārum nāṟppatteṇṇāyirapaṭṭar Aracapparum kākkunāyakapaṭṭar Ellapparum tirumalaipaṭṭarum maṟṟumuḷḷa tāṉattārum kaikkoḷamutalikaḷ ceviṭakaviṇṭarum Atirāma kiḻār kāḷattinātarum Amalaiapparum periyakuppaṇarum tiruvampalattu nallavaṉum cilampānātarum maṟṟu muḷ
ḷa kaikkoḷa mutalikaḷ maṟṟumuḷḷa Ūravarum tiruvekampaceri kantāpuripeṭṭait teṉkāleccikiḻavar veṅkapparum kāḷatn=tinātarum cempantaiyār cokkannayiṉarum cāttantaiyār comāṇṭiyum maṟṟumuḷḷa Ūravarum tiruvelaiceri Akaram kumaraṇṇaappaṉ maṟṟumuḷḷa Akṣe makāceṉaṅkaḷum Āka Ivvaṉaivorum yimmaṇṭalattu
yik koṭṭattu kalavaippaṟṟu karaivaḻi nāṭṭu cekanātanallūrāṉa pūṇṭi kaṭampuḻār kuruvīṉār maṟṟu Uḷḷa Ūravaṟku taṉmacātaṉam paṇṇikuṭuttapaṭi taṅkaḷ kiṟāmattukku Āṟṟukāl toṇṭaveṇṭukaiyil yiṟṟai nāḷāl nāyakkar vayyappanāyakkar Ayyaṉ kumāra kiṣṇappanāyakkar Ayyaṉavarkaḷukku puṇṇiyamākavum velūr virappanāya
kkar nayiṉappa nāyakkar pappuṉāyakkaṟku puṇṇiyamākavum ciṉṉapommu nāyakkarum tippunāyakkarum karaivaḻikīḻ kiṟāmattil Uṇṭāṉa mutalikaḷum valliūrāka Uṭaiyār tiruvaṉanticuramuṭaiya nayiṉār caṉṉatiyil vaṉtiruntu kāl toṇṭuvikka kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭapaṭi Eṅkaḷ Ellaiyile kāl toṇṭik koṇṭu poṟattukku Ellai kuṟitta viparam kālukkut talaippeḻai vaṉṉi veṭu Ellaiyle paṅko
Digital edition of SII 41.199 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
